# Info
*Please provide relevant information for each section below.*

## Description
*What is the issue you are facing?*

## Expected Behaviour
*What is supposed to happen instead of this?*

## Reproduction
*Please provide detailed reproduction steps as an ordered Markdown list below.*

## Device Information
*Please check the Android OS and version which matches with your device.*

### Android Version

⬜️ Android 13
⬜️ Android 14
⬜️ Android 15
⬜️ Android 16
⬜️ Android 17

### OS

⬜️ PixelOS

⬜️ GrapheneOS
⬜️ Other (please specify)

## Screenshots
*Providing screenshots is optional, but helps significantly.*

## Logs
*Providing logs is optional, but may help debug the root cause of the issue*
**IMPORTANT:** *Please ensure that no [PII](https://en.wiktionary.org/wiki/PII#Noun) is in the logs before posting!*

## Other
*Provide other information you may think is helpful here, if any.*
